merge.name: Merge PDF
merge.description: Combine multiple PDF files into a single document.
merge.metaTitle: Merge PDF - Free Online PDF Combiner
merge.metaDescription: Merge multiple PDF files into one document. Free online tool, no upload needed. Your files stay in your browser.
merge.keywords: merge pdf, combine pdf, join pdf, pdf merger online

faq.a1: Upload multiple PDF files, reorder them as needed, and click merge. All processing happens in your browser — files are never uploaded.
faq.q2: Is there a file size limit?
faq.a2: There's no hard limit, but very large files may be slow since processing happens in your browser.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device. You can verify this by opening DevTools (F12) and checking the Network tab — zero upload requests.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.

faq.a1: Yes, you can split by individual pages or specify custom ranges like 1-3, 4-6, 7-10.
faq.q2: Are my files uploaded to a server?
faq.a2: No. All processing happens locally in your browser. Your files never leave your device.

faq.q1: How do I select pages to delete?
faq.a1: Upload a PDF and click on the page thumbnails you want to remove. Selected pages are highlighted. Click the delete button to create a new PDF without those pages.
faq.a2: The original file is not modified. A new PDF is created without the selected pages. You can always re-upload the original.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?

faq.a2: Yes, use the scale slider. 1x gives standard resolution, 2x doubles it, up to 4x for high-resolution output.

faq.q1: What image formats can I convert to PDF?
faq.a1: You can convert JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP, BMP, and other common image formats. Non-standard formats are automatically converted before embedding.
faq.q2: Can I reorder the images before converting?
faq.a2: Yes, use the arrow buttons on each image thumbnail to reorder them. The final PDF pages will match the order shown.

rotate.metaDescription: Rotate PDF pages clockwise, counter-clockwise, or 180 degrees. Free online tool, works in your browser.

faq.a1: Currently the tool rotates all pages by the same angle. For per-page rotation, you can apply different rotations by processing the PDF multiple times.
faq.q2: Does rotation affect the PDF content quality?
faq.a2: No, rotation only changes the page orientation metadata. The content, text, and images remain unchanged.

faq.q1: Can I choose where page numbers appear?
faq.a1: Yes, you can place page numbers at any of six positions: top or bottom, combined with left, center, or right alignment.
faq.q2: Can I skip numbering on certain pages?
faq.a2: Yes, use the 'Start from page' option to skip the first N pages (useful for title pages or table of contents).

faq.q1: Does this work with scanned PDFs?

faq.a2: Basic text content is extracted page by page. Complex formatting like tables and columns may not be perfectly preserved.

crop.marginsHint: Enter the amount to crop from each side (1 point ≈ 0.35mm)

faq.a1: PDF uses points as its unit of measurement. 1 point = 1/72 inch ≈ 0.35mm. A standard US Letter page is 612 × 792 points.
faq.a2: Cropping changes the visible area but does not remove the hidden content, so file size may not decrease significantly.
